rows.answer:
We have 3 tiers: Free, Pro, and Business.

Free: 3 tailored applications/month, 0 premium applications/month, 20 assistant turns/month, 3 resume parses/month, 50 job searches/month, 5 saved jobs, 1 saved workspace, 1 lifetime resume-builder session, 7-day saved-workspace retention, and PDF export in the professional_neutral theme only.

Pro: 20 tailored applications/month, 5 premium applications/month, 150 assistant turns/month, 25 resume parses/month, unlimited job searches, 1000 saved jobs, 5 saved workspaces, 3 resume-builder sessions/month, 30-day saved-workspace retention, and PDF or DOCX export in any resume theme.

Business: 80 tailored applications/month, 25 premium applications/month, 500 assistant turns/month, 100 resume parses/month, unlimited job searches, unlimited saved jobs, unlimited saved workspaces, 15 resume-builder sessions/month, unbounded saved-workspace retention, and PDF or DOCX export in any resume theme.

Monthly quotas reset at the start of each calendar month (UTC); lifetime counters do not reset.
sources: Product knowledge: pricing tiers and quotas

rows.reason: one_of(['professional_neutral', 'professional neutral'])=True one_of(['modern_blue', 'modern blue'])=True one_of(['creative_warm', 'creative warm', 'architect_mono', 'architect mono', 'classic_ats', 'classic ats', 'presentation_twocol', 'presentation', 'two-column', 'two column'])=True
rows.answer: There are 6 export themes: classic_ats, professional_neutral, modern_blue, creative_warm, architect_mono, and presentation_twocol. The first 5 are single-column ATS-safe layouts; presentation_twocol is a two-column designer layout and is flagged non-ATS. If you're on Free, you can export PDF only in professional_neutral; Pro and Business can export PDF or DOCX in any theme.

rows.answer:
We have three pricing tiers: **Free**, **Pro**, and **Business**. Here's what you get on each:

**Free**: 3 tailored applications/month, 0 premium applications, 20 assistant chat turns/month, 3 resume parses/month, 50 job searches/month, 5 saved jobs, 1 saved workspace (7-day retention), 1 lifetime resume builder session, PDF export in professional_neutral theme only.

**Pro**: 20 tailored applications/month, 5 premium applications/month, 150 assistant turns/month, 25 resume parses/month, unlimited job searches, 1,000 saved jobs, 5 saved workspaces (30-day retention), 3 resume builder sessions/month, PDF or DOCX export in any of the six themes.

**Business**: 80 tailored applications/month, 25 premium applications/month, 500 assistant turns/month, 100 resume parses/month, unlimited job searches, unlimited saved jobs, unlimited saved workspaces (no expiration), 15 resume builder sessions/month, PDF or DOCX export in any theme.

Monthly counters reset at the start of each calendar month (UTC).

rows.answer: You can choose from six resume themes when exporting: classic_ats, professional_neutral (the default), modern_blue, creative_warm, architect_mono, and presentation_twocol.
